entries.source: "I don't get negative numbers"
entries.value: "Sielewi namba hasi"

entries.source: "I think heavier objects fall faster"
entries.value: "Nadhani vitu vizito huanguka haraka zaidi"

entries.source: "Why is this grammar rule weird?"
entries.value: "Kwa nini kanuni hii ya sarufi ni ya ajabu?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Misconception Doctor on inspir for thinking learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Mwongozo wa vitendo wa kutumia Misconception Doctor kwenye inspir kwa kujifunza kufikiri, ukiwa na vidokezo, mizunguko ya masomo, na tabia salama zaidi za AI.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Mzunguko imara zaidi wa kusoma

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Rekebisha kipindi kulingana na lengo lako.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Mkufunzi wa AI

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Omba hatua ndogo ya kwanza badala ya jibu la mwisho.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Iombe AI ikague mantiki yako, si matokeo tu.

entries.source: Find and fix wrong mental models.
entries.value: Tafuta na rekebisha mifano ya akili isiyo sahihi.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Malizia kwa kuandika wazo tena kutoka kumbukumbu.

entries.source: Learners exploring thinking topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Wanafunzi wanaochunguza mada za kufikiri ambao wanataka mwongozo wa kivitendo badala ya kisanduku cha majibu ya kawaida.

entries.source: Misconception Doctor
entries.value: Daktari wa Dhana Potofu

entries.source: Misconception Doctor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Misconception Doctor ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: sema unachodhani kinaendelea, na msaidizi wako atambue dhana potofu zilizofichwa kwa vipimo vya upole.

entries.source: Misconception Doctor AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Misconception Doctor: mwongozo wa vitendo

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Vidokezo vya kujaribu

entries.source: Start the live mode at Misconception Doctor. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Feynman Tutor. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Anza hali ya moja kwa moja kwenye Misconception Doctor. Ikiwa unataka muundo wa kujifunza unaokaribiana, jaribu Feynman Tutor. Kwa mtazamo mpana zaidi wa jukwaa, soma kile ambacho mwenzi wa kujifunza wa AI anapaswa kufanya kwa kila mtu.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Anza na mifano ya vidokezo.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Iambie hali unachojaribu kujifunza au kutengeneza.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Tofauti hiyo huonekana katika mtiririko. Badala ya jibu moja kubwa, vipindi bora hupitia mzunguko: weka lengo, jaribu kitu, pata mrejesho, rekebisha sehemu dhaifu, na chagua hatua inayofuata.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Mkazo huo ni muhimu. Chatbot ya jumla inaweza kujibu karibu chochote, lakini hali ya kujifunza huipa mazungumzo umbo. Hukuelekeza kwenye aina ya kufikiri, mazoezi, mrejesho, au uchunguzi unaosaidia wazo kushikamana.

entries.source: Thinking
entries.value: Kufikiri

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hii ndiyo tabia ile ile iliyo nyuma ya kusoma kwa AI bila kujidanganya: mfanye mwanafunzi abaki hai. AI ina manufaa zaidi inapokupa mrejesho kuhusu kufikiri kwako.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Hali hii ina manufaa hasa kwa wanafunzi wanaotaka:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for misconception doctor with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Hali hii imesanifiwa kwa ajili ya daktari wa dhana potofu ikiwa na vidokezo vyake, mifano, na mtiririko wa kujifunza.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Jaribu hatua kwa maneno yako mwenyewe.

entries.source: Use Misconception Doctor when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Tumia Misconception Doctor unapotaka kipindi kinachoanza haraka lakini bado kinajirekebisha kulingana nawe. Lengo la kwanza si kusikika wa kuvutia. Lengo la kwanza ni kufanya hatua inayofuata ihisi inawezekana.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Hali hii husaidia nini

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Pa kwenda baadaye

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Unaweza pia kuanza na toleo lisilo kamili la tatizo lako halisi. Kidokezo cha kwanza kisicho safi ni sawa. Kipindi kinaweza kufafanua kiwango, hadhira, muda wa mwisho, na mtindo mara tu unapoanza.
